tools.name: assign_person
tools.title: assign_person
tools.description: Use to add candidate or prospect to a project pipeline

tools.name: auth_validate
tools.title: auth_validate
tools.description: Use this tool to validate an authentication token.

token.description: The authentication Bearer token to validate.

tools.name: create_event
tools.title: create_event
tools.description: Use to schedule a new candidate event

tools.name: create_project
tools.title: create_project
tools.description: Use to create a new ATS project. Call initialize_stages after creation

tools.name: get_candidate
tools.title: get_candidate
tools.description: Use this tool to retrieve the complete profile of a candidate using their ElasticSearch document ID. Returns full candidate information including name, email, skills, experience, education, and all parsed resume data.

elastic_search_id.description: The ElasticSearch document ID of the candidate.

tools.name: initialize_stages
tools.title: initialize_stages
tools.description: Use after project creation to initialize candidate or prospect stages

tools.name: list_applications
tools.title: list_applications
tools.description: Use this tool to retrieve a paginated list of job applications. You can filter by status (pending or read), search by keyword, and paginate with page and per_page. Returns applicant details including name, email, position, and application status.

status.description: Filter by application status: pending or read. Leave empty for all.

page.description: Page number for pagination. Defaults to 1.

per_page.description: Number of results per page. Defaults to 25.

keyword.description: Search keyword to filter applications by name or email.

tools.name: list_events
tools.title: list_events
tools.description: Use this tool to retrieve candidate events such as interviews and scheduled meetings. You can filter by status (pending or completed). Returns event details including candidate info, project, date, and status.

status.description: Filter by event status: pending or completed. Leave empty for all.

tools.name: list_linkedin_events
tools.title: list_linkedin_events
tools.description: Use this tool to get recent LinkedIn activity such as messages, connections, and profile views. Specify days_back to control the time window (defaults to 7 days). Returns an array of LinkedIn events with timestamps and details.

days_back.description: Number of days to look back. Defaults to 7.

tools.name: mcp_get_pipeline
tools.title: mcp_get_pipeline
tools.description: Use this tool to get the pipeline stages and person counts for a specific project. Provide the auth token, project_id, and stage_type (prospects or candidates). Makes two API calls: one for stages and one for counts, and combines them into a single result.

token.description: Authentication bearer token for the BWATS API.

stage_type.description: Type of pipeline stages to retrieve: prospects or candidates.

tools.name: mcp_get_project
tools.title: mcp_get_project
tools.description: Use this tool to get full details of a specific project including description, location, qualifications, recruiter context, and application info. Provide the auth token and project_id.

token.description: Authentication bearer token for the BWATS API.

project_id.description: The ID of the project to retrieve.

tools.name: mcp_get_prospect
tools.title: mcp_get_prospect
tools.description: Use this tool to retrieve the complete profile of a prospect from the BWATS ATS system. Provide the auth token and the elastic_search_id of the prospect. Returns the full prospect profile including parsed resume data, contact info, skills, and experience.

token.description: Authentication bearer token for the BWATS API.

elastic_search_id.description: The ElasticSearch document ID of the prospect to retrieve.

tools.name: mcp_list_projects
tools.title: mcp_list_projects
tools.description: Use this tool to list all projects in the BWATS ATS system. Optionally filter by status (active or closed). Returns an array of project objects with basic details.

token.description: Authentication bearer token for the BWATS API.

status.description: Optional filter: active or closed. If omitted, returns all projects.

tools.name: mcp_list_stage_people
tools.title: mcp_list_stage_people
tools.description: Use this tool to get a paginated list of people in a specific pipeline stage. Provide the auth token, project_id, stage_id, and stage_type. Optionally specify page and per_page for pagination.

token.description: Authentication bearer token for the BWATS API.

stage_id.description: The ID of the stage to list people from.

stage_type.description: Type of stage: prospects or candidates.

page.description: Page number for pagination. Defaults to 1.

per_page.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 25.

tools.name: mcp_search_candidates
tools.title: mcp_search_candidates
tools.description: Use this tool to search for candidates in the BWATS ATS ElasticSearch index. Supports keyword_search, max_salary, min_year_of_experience, max_years_of_experience, city, role, page, item_per_page filters. All search parameters are optional.

token.description: Authentication bearer token for the BWATS API.

tools.name: mcp_search_prospects
tools.title: mcp_search_prospects
tools.description: Use this tool to search for prospects in the BWATS ATS ElasticSearch index. Supports keyword_search, max_salary, min_year_of_experience, max_years_of_experience, city, role, page, item_per_page filters. All search parameters are optional.

token.description: Authentication bearer token for the BWATS API.

tools.name: move_person
tools.title: move_person
tools.description: Use to change stage for a candidate or prospect in a project pipeline

activity_type.description: Optional activity type, defaults to stage_change

tools.name: search_in_project
tools.title: search_in_project
tools.description: Use keyword search scoped to one project

tools.name: task_counts
tools.title: task_counts
tools.description: Use this tool to get an overview of task counts across all projects. Returns counts grouped by project and status (pending, in_progress, completed, etc.). Useful for dashboard summaries and workload monitoring.

tools.name: update_application
tools.title: update_application
tools.description: Use to mark an application notification as pending or read

tools.name: update_event
tools.title: update_event
tools.description: Use to update event fields. Only provided non-null fields are sent

tools.name: update_notes_candidate
tools.title: update_notes_candidate
tools.description: Use to add or replace notes for a candidate by elastic search id

tools.name: update_notes_prospect
tools.title: update_notes_prospect
tools.description: Use to add or replace notes for a prospect by elastic search id. Uses API field prospec_es_id exactly as backend expects

prospec_es_id.description: Prospect elastic search id (intentional API spelling)
